title: Concession: a pesar de, pese a
subtitle: Say despite.
overview: A pesar de + noun or infinitive means despite.
It helps add nuance to stories and opinions.

items.es: A pesar del tráfico, llegamos a tiempo.
items.en: Despite the traffic, we arrived on time.

items.es: A pesar de estar cansado, terminé el trabajo.
items.en: Despite being tired, I finished the work.

items.es: Pese a los problemas, el viaje fue bonito.
items.en: Despite the problems, the trip was nice.

items.es: A pesar de que era caro, decidimos quedarnos.
items.en: Despite the fact that it was expensive, we decided to stay.

items.es: Sigo estudiando a pesar de los errores.
items.en: I keep studying despite the mistakes.
